context.audience: Developers building data pipelines with LLMs, pSEO practitioners generating content at scale, developers replacing brittle prompt parsing with schema-validated output
pain_points: LLMs occasionally breaking JSON structure despite instruction
Choosing between function calling, JSON mode, and Zod-validated output
Schema design that balances flexibility and constraint
Handling partial or streaming structured responses
Cost per output token vs. quality trade-offs across models
content_that_works: Model comparison for structured output reliability
Zod integration tutorials for LLM output
subtopics: Function calling vs. JSON mode vs. constrained decoding
Zod schema design for LLM output
